mapper.subject: Thank you for your inquiry
mapper.content:
Thank you for reaching out!

Hi {{2.answers.`576bc145`.textAnswers.answers[].value}},

Thank you for submitting your inquiry. Unfortunately, we specialize in web design services only and your project falls outside our area of expertise.

We wish you the best in finding the right professional for your needs.

Marco's Web Design
